error.unsupportedYoVersion: The installed version of the `Yo` CLI tool: {{installedYoVersion}} is not supported. Please use `npm` or `yarn` to globally install the latest supported version by running: 'npm i -g yo@{{latestSupportedYoVer}}'.
error.executingNpmListCmd: Running: {{npmCmd}} returned an error: {{- error}}. Check that `npm` is installed and available on the path. If `yo@{{latestSupportedYoVer}}` is not installed use `npm` or `yarn` to globally install the latest required version by running: 'npm i -g yo@{{latestSupportedYoVer}}'.
